mainEntity.name: How is permanent disability rated for ladder fall back injuries in Millcreek?
mainEntity.text: How is permanent disability rated for ladder fall back injuries in Millcreek?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah uses AMA Guides 6th Edition for impairment ratings; back ladder fall injuries often rated 5-25% whole person impairment (WPI) based on DRE categories, yielding PPD compensation.

suggestedAnswer.text: Ladder falls commonly cause lumbar strains rated via DRE method (e.g., DRE Lumbar Category II: 5-8% WPI). Independent medical exam (IME) determines rating. Dispute unfair IMEs with your doctor. Millcreek claims average $20K-$100K PPD; negotiate lump sums carefully.

name: Disability Ratings for Ladder Back Injuries
description: Utah uses AMA Guides 6th Edition for impairment ratings; back ladder fall injuries often rated 5-25% whole person impairment (WPI) based on DRE categories, yiel
